messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0155",
  "title": "独家视角",
  "page_index": 94,
  "page_range": "94"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0156",
    "title": "93 独家视角",
    "page_range": "94",
    "summary": "This parent section (\"93 独家视角\", pages 94–97) provides an exclusive perspective on modern game operations (游戏运营), organized around four core platforms: Youdao Ads, OneSight, ToBid, and Joyce. It covers AI-driven digital marketing, AIGC creative production, intelligent KOL workflows, game brand positioning, community co-creation, and mobile ad monetization strategy. Key entities include Youdao Ads, OneSight, ToBid, Joyce, AI/AIGC, LLMs, KOLs, 《鸣潮》(Wuthering Waves), 《原神》(Genshin Impact), 《燕云十六声》, UGC creators, developers, and advertisers. Relevant dates include 2025 (industry transition to an \"efficiency-first\" monetization model) and 2026 (projected milestone for full-chain AI marketing platforms and structural traffic optimization). The text defines a \"full-chain AI intelligent marketing platform,\" a \"player co-creation space,\" and contrasts \"character-centric\" versus \"story-centric\" IP development paths. Documented procedures include AI-driven market analysis and real-time ad iteration, end-to-end KOL campaign workflows (Insight → Screening → Connection → Review), version-synchronized UGC campaigns, bidirectional community feedback channels, and global revenue optimization frameworks that replace basic price sorting. Core claims assert that AI precision and data-driven iteration are primary competitive differentiators, character-centric models deepen long-term IP emotional attachment, story-centric approaches transform players into active co-creators, and short-term eCPM chasing is unsustainable amid slowing traffic growth and tighter budgets. Tracked metrics include eCPM, fill rate, frequency capping, long-term ARPDAU, and LTV. Evidence is supported by industry trend analysis, strategic forecasting, conceptual framework comparisons, and specific game case studies. No..."
  }
]

message.content: This section ("独家视角", page 94) provides an exclusive perspective on modern game operations (游戏运营), structured around four core platforms: Youdao Ads, OneSight, ToBid, and Joyce. It covers AI-driven digital marketing, AIGC creative production, intelligent KOL workflows, game brand positioning, community co-creation, and mobile ad monetization strategy. Key entities include Youdao Ads, OneSight, ToBid, Joyce, AI/AIGC, LLMs, KOLs, UGC creators, developers, advertisers, and specific game titles such as 《鸣潮》(Wuthering Waves), 《原神》(Genshin Impact), and 《燕云十六声》. Notable dates include 2025, marking the industry's shift to an "efficiency-first" monetization model, and 2026, projected as the milestone for full-chain AI marketing platforms and structural traffic optimization. The text defines a "full-chain AI intelligent marketing platform" and a "player co-creation space," while contrasting "character-centric" versus "story-centric" IP development paths. Documented procedures encompass AI-driven market analysis with real-time ad iteration, end-to-end KOL campaign workflows (Insight → Screening → Connection → Review), version-synchronized UGC campaigns, bidirectional community feedback channels, and global revenue optimization frameworks that replace basic price sorting. Core claims assert that AI precision and data-driven iteration are primary competitive differentiators, character-centric models deepen long-term IP emotional attachment, story-centric approaches transform players into active co-creators, and short-term eCPM chasing is unsustainable given slowing traffic growth and tighter budgets. Tracked metrics include eCPM, fill rate, frequency capping, long-term ARPDAU, and LTV. Evidence is supported by industry trend analysis, strategic forecasting, conceptual framework comparisons, and specific game case studies. No tables or figures are explicitly referenced.

Notable dates include 2025, marking the industry's shift to an "efficiency-first" monetization model, and 2026, projected as the milestone for full-chain AI marketing platforms and structural traffic optimization. The text defines a "full-chain AI intelligent marketing platform" and a "player co-creation space," while contrasting "character-centric" versus "story-centric" IP development paths. Documented procedures encompass AI-driven market analysis with real-time ad iteration, end-to-end KOL campaign workflows (Insight → Screening → Connection → Review), version-synchronized UGC campaigns, bidirectional community feedback channels, and global revenue optimization frameworks that replace basic price sorting. Core claims assert that AI precision and data-driven iteration are primary competitive differentiators, character-centric models deepen long-term IP emotional attachment, story-centric approaches transform players into active co-creators, and short-term eCPM chasing is unsustainable given slowing traffic growth and tighter budgets. Tracked metrics include eCPM, fill rate, frequency capping, long-term ARPDAU, and LTV. Evidence is supported by industry trend analysis, strategic forecasting, conceptual framework comparisons, and specific game case studies. No tables or figures are explicitly referenced.
